SANSKRIT: पुराशब्द उपपदे स्मशब्दवर्जिते भूतानद्यतनेऽर्थे विभाषा लुङ्प्रत्ययो भवति लट् च ॥
ENGLISH: Optionally the affixes लुङ् and लट् come after a verb, in denoting past time not belonging to the current day, when the word पुरा is used in the sentence, provided that the word स्म is not used.

[885] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.123)
SANSKRIT: आरब्धोऽपरिसमाप्तश्च वर्त्तमानस्तस्मिन् वर्त्तमानेऽर्थे वर्त्तमानाद्धातोर्लट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix लट् comes after a verb when denoting a present action.

[886] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.124)
SANSKRIT: लटः शतृशानचावित्येतावादेशौ भवतः अप्रथमान्तेन चेत्तस्य सामानाधिकरण्यं भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes शतृ and शानच् are substitutes of लट् when agreeing with what does not end with the first case-affix.

[887] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.125)
SANSKRIT: सम्बोधने च विषये लटः शतृशानचौ प्रत्ययौ भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes शतृ and शानच् are the substitutes of लट् even when agreeing with what ends with a first case-affix, provided that it is in the vocative case.

[888] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.126)
SANSKRIT: लक्षणे हेतौ चार्थे वर्त्तमानाद्धातोः परस्य लटः शतृशानचादेशौ भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes शतृ and शानच् are the substitutes of लट् and come after a verb, in expressing an attendent circumstance or characteristic, and the cause of an action.

[889] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.127)
SANSKRIT: तौ शतृशानचौ सत्संज्ञौ भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: These two शतृ and शानच् are called सत्.

[890] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.128)
SANSKRIT: पूङो यजेश्च धातोः शानन् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix शानन् comes after the verbs पू 'to purify' and यज् 'to sacrifice'.

[891] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.129)
SANSKRIT: ताच्छील्यादिषु धातोश्चानश्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix चानश् comes after a verb in expressing 'habit', 'standard of age' and 'ability'.

[892] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.130)
SANSKRIT: इङो धारेश्च धात्वोः शतृप्रत्ययो भवति अकृच्छ्रिणि कर्त्तरि ॥
ENGLISH: The affix शतृ comes after the verbs इङ् 'to go' and धारि 'to hold' in denoting that the agent does the action without trouble.

[893] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.131)
SANSKRIT: अमित्रे कर्तरि द्विषेर्धातोः शतृप्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix शतृ comes after the verb द्विष् when the agent indicated means an enemy.

[894] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.132)
SANSKRIT: यज्ञसंयुक्तेऽभिषये वर्तमानात्सुनोतेर्धातोः शतृप्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix शतृ comes after the verb सु 'to press out juice' when the sense is that of association with sacrifice.

[895] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.133)
SANSKRIT: अर्हतेर्द्धातोः प्रशंसायां शतृप्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix शतृ comes after the verb अर्ह in expressing praise.

[896] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.134)
SANSKRIT: आ एतस्मात् क्विप्संशब्दाद्यानित ऊर्द्धमनुक्रमिष्यामस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु ते वेदितव्याः ॥
ENGLISH: From this _sutra_ as far as क्विप् in _sutra_ 177 inclusive, the affixes that we shall treat of, are to be understood in the sense of agents having such a habit, or nature, or having skill in such and such action.

[897] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.135)
SANSKRIT: सर्वधातुभ्यस्तृन्प्रत्ययो भवति तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु
ENGLISH: The affix तृन् comes after all verbs in the sense of 'agents having such a habit &c'.

[898] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.136)
SANSKRIT: अलंकृञादिभ्यो धातुभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु इष्णुच्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix इष्णुच् comes after the following verbs in the sense of the 'agents having such a habit & c'; viz.-- अलंकृ 'to adorn', निराकृ 'to expel', प्रजन् 'to be born', उतपच् 'to be ripe', उत्पत् 'to fly', उन्मद् 'to be mad', रुच् 'to shine', अपत्रप् 'to be ashamed', वृत् 'to be', वृध् 'to grow', सह् 'to bear' and चर् 'to walk'.

[899] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.137)
SANSKRIT: ण्यन्ताद्धातोश्छन्दसि विषये तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु इष्णुच्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix इष्णुच् in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c', comes in the _Chhandas_ after a verb that ends in the causative णि.

[900] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.138)
SANSKRIT: भवतेर्द्धातोश्छन्दसि विषये तच्छीलादिषु इष्णुच्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix इष्णुच् in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c', comes in the _Chhandas_, after the verb भू 'to be' also.

[901] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.139)
SANSKRIT: ग्ला जि स्था इत्येतेभ्यो धातुभ्यश्चाकाराद् भुवश्च तच्छीलादिषु क्स्नुः प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix क्स्नु comes after the following verbs in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c.' viz.- ग्ला 'to be weary', जि 'to conquer' and स्था 'to stand', as well as after भू 'to be'.

[902] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.140)
SANSKRIT: त्रसादिभ्यो धातुभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु क्नुः प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix क्नु comes after the verbs त्रस् 'to tremble', गृध् 'to be greedy', धृष् 'to be bold' and क्षिप् 'to throw' in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c'.

[903] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.141)
SANSKRIT: शमादिभ्यो धातुभ्योऽष्टाभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु घिनुण्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix घिनुण् comes after the eight verbs beginning with शम् 'to be calm', in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c'.

[904] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.142)
SANSKRIT: सम्पृचादिभ्यो धातुभ्यो घिनुण्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix घिनुण् comes after the following verbs, in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c'. viz :- सम्पृच्, अनुरुध्, आयम्, आयस्, परिसृ, संसृज्, परिदेव, संज्वर, परिक्षिप्, परिरट्, परिवद्, परिदह्, परिमुह्, दुष्, द्विष्, द्रुह्, दुह्, युज्, आक्रीड्, विविच्, त्यज्, रज्, भज्, अतिचर्, अपचर्, आमुष् and अभ्याहन्.

[905] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.143)
SANSKRIT: कष लस कत्थ स्रम्भ एतेभ्यो धातुभ्यो विशब्द उपपदे घिनुण्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix घिनुण् comes after the verbs कष् 'to injure', लस् 'to embrace and sport', कत्थ 'to praise' and स्रम्भ 'to believe', when these are in composition with the preposition वि ।

[906] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.144)
SANSKRIT: लष कान्तौ, अस्माद्धातोरपउपपदे चकाराद्वौ च घिनुण्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix घिनुण् comes after the verb लष 'to wish' when compounded with the preposition अप and वि.

[907] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.145)
SANSKRIT: प्र उपपदे लपादिभ्यो घिनुण्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix घिनुण् comes after the verbs लप्, सृ, द्रु, मथ, वद् and वस when compounded with the preposition वि.

[908] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.146)
SANSKRIT: निन्दादिभ्यो धातुभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु वुञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix वुञ् is added to the following verbs in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c':-- निन्द्, हिन्स्, क्लिश्, खाद्, विनाश्, परिक्षिप्, परिरट्, परिवादि, व्यभाष् and असूय ।

[909] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.147)
SANSKRIT: देवयतेः क्रुशोश्चोपसर्गे उपपदे वुञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix वुञ् comes after the verbs देवि 'to lament' and क्रुश् 'to cry', when an _upasarga_ is in composition with them.

[910] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.148)
SANSKRIT: चलनार्थेभ्यः शब्दार्थेभ्यश्चाकर्मकेभ्यो धातुभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु युच्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix युच् comes, in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c'. after intransitive verbs denoting 'motion' or 'sound'.

[911] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.149)
SANSKRIT: अनुदात्तेद्यो धातुः हलादिरकर्मकस्ततश्च युच् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix युच् comes in the same sense after such intransitive verbs as are _Atmanepadi_ and begin with a consonant and are _Anudattet_ i. e. have a gravely accented vowel as indicatory.

[912] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.150)
SANSKRIT: जु प्रभृतिभ्यो धातुभ्यो युच् प्रत्ययो भवति तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु ॥
ENGLISH: The affix युच् comes after the following verbs in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c', viz:- जु, चंक्रम्य, दन्द्रम्य, सृ, गृध, ज्वल, शुच, लष, पत and पद.

[913] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.151)
SANSKRIT: क्रुध कोपे, मण्ड भूषायाम्, इत्येतदर्थेभ्यश्च धातुभ्यो युच् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: And after the verbs having the sense of क्रुध् 'to be angry' and मण्ड 'to adorn', the afix युच् is employed.

[914] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.152)
SANSKRIT: यकारान्ताद्धातोर्युच् प्रत्ययो न भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix युच् is not employed after those verbs which end in the letter य.

[915] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.153)
SANSKRIT: सूददीपदीक्ष इत्येतेभ्यश्च युच्प्रत्ययो न भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix युच् does not come after the verbs सूद् 'to strike', दीप् 'to shine' and दीक्ष् 'to initiate'.

[916] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.154)
SANSKRIT: लषादिभ्यो धातुभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु उकञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix उकञ् comes after the following verbs, in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c':-लष्, पत्, पद्, स्था, भू, वृष्, हन्, कम्, गम् and शृ ।

[917] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.155)
SANSKRIT: जल्पादिभ्यो धातुभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु षाकन्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix षाकन् comes, in the sense of the 'agent having such a habit &c', after the following verbs:-- जल्प्, भिक्ष्, कुदृ, लुष्ठ and वृ ।

[918] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.156)
SANSKRIT: प्रपूर्वाज्जवतेस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु इनिः प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix इनि comes in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit etc'. after the verb प्रजु 'to hasten forward'.

[919] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.157)
SANSKRIT: जिप्रभृतिभ्यो धातुभ्य इनिःप्रत्ययो भवति तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु ॥
ENGLISH: The affix इनि comes, in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c', after the verbs जि 'to conquer', दृ 'to respect', क्षि 'to waste, to dwell, to go', विश्रि 'to shelter', इ 'to go', वम् 'to vomit', अव्यथ 'not to give pain', अभ्यम 'to injure', परिभू 'to humiliate' and प्रसू 'to beget'.

[920] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.158)
SANSKRIT: स्पृहिगृहिपतिदयिनिद्रातन्द्राश्रद्धा एतेभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषुकर्तृषु आलुच्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix आलुच् comes in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c', after the following words:- स्पृह 'to desire', गृह 'to seize', पत 'to go', दय 'to give, to go, to protect', निद्रा 'to sleep', तन्द्रा 'to be tired' and श्रद्धा 'to venerate'.

[921] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.159)
SANSKRIT: दा धेट् सि शद सद इत्येतेभ्यो प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix रु comes after the verbs दा 'to give', धेट् 'to suck', सि 'to bind', शद 'to fall' and सद 'to sit'.

[922] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.160)
SANSKRIT: सृ घसि अद इत्येतेभ्यो धातुभ्यः तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु क्मरच्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix क्मरच् in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c', comes after the verbs सृ 'to flow', घसि 'to eat' and अद 'to eat'.

[923] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.161)
SANSKRIT: भञ्ज भास मिद इत्येतेभ्यो घुरच्प्रत्ययो भवति तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु ॥
ENGLISH: The affix घुरच् comes in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c.', after the verbs भञ्ज् 'to break', भास् 'to shine', and मिद 'to be fat'.

[924] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.162)
SANSKRIT: विदादिभ्यो धातुभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु कुरच्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix कुरच् comes, in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c', after the verbs विद् 'to know', भिद् 'to divide' and छिद् 'to pierce'.

[925] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.163)
SANSKRIT: इण् नश् जि सर्त्ति इत्येतेभ्यो धातुभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु क्वरप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix क्वरप् comes, in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c', after the verbs इ 'to go', नश् 'to destroy', जि 'to conquer', and सृ 'to flow'.

[926] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.164)
SANSKRIT: गत्वर इति निपात्यते, गमेरनुनासिकलोपः क्वरप्प्रत्ययश्च ॥
ENGLISH: And the word गत्वर is irregularly formed.

[927] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.165)
SANSKRIT: जागर्त्तेरूकः प्रत्ययो भवति तच्छीलादिषु कर्त्तृषु ॥
ENGLISH: The affix ऊक comes after the verb जागृ 'to be awake' in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit'.

[928] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.166)
SANSKRIT: यजादीनां यङन्तानामूकः प्रत्ययो भवति तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु ॥
ENGLISH: The affix ऊक comes in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c', after the verbs यज्, जप् and दश् when they end in the affix यङ्.

[929] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.167)
SANSKRIT: नम्यादिभ्यो धातुभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु रः प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix र comes in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c' after the verbs नम 'to bow', कम्प् 'to shake', स्मि 'to smile', अजस् 'not to cease', कम 'to desire', हिन्स 'to injure', and दीप 'to shine'.

[930] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.168)
SANSKRIT: सन्नन्तेभ्यो धातुभ्य आशंसेर्भिक्षेश्च तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु उः प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix उ comes after roots that have taken the affix सन्, and after the verbs आशंस् 'to wish' and भिक्ष् 'to beg' in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c'.

[931] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.169)
SANSKRIT: विदेर्नुमागम इषेश्छत्वमुकारश्च प्रत्ययो निपात्यते तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु ॥
ENGLISH: The words विन्दु and इच्छु are irregularly formed by the addition of the affix उ, in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c'.

[932] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.171)
SANSKRIT: आकारान्तेभ्य ऋवर्णान्तेभ्यश्च गम हन जन इत्येतेभ्यश्छन्दसि विषये तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु किकिनौ प्रत्ययौ भवतः, लिड्वच्च तौ भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: In the _Chhandas_, the affixes कि and किन् in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c' come after the verbs that end in long आ, or short or long ऋ, and after the verbs गम् 'to go', हन् 'to kill', and जन् 'to be produced', and these affixes operate like लिट् causing reduplication of the root.

[933] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.173)
SANSKRIT: शॄ हिंसायाम् वन्दि अभिवादनस्तुत्योः एताभ्यां तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृष्वारुः प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix आरु comes in the sense of 'the agents having such a habit &c' after the verbs शॄ 'to injure' and वन्द 'to praise', 'to salute'.

[934] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.174)
SANSKRIT: ञिभी भये अस्माद्धातोस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु क्रुक्लुकनौ प्रत्ययौ भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes क्रु and क्लुकन come in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit' after the verb भी 'to fear'.

[935] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.175)
SANSKRIT: स्था ईश भास पिस कस एतेभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु वरच्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix वरच् comes, in the sense of 'the agents having such a habit &c' after the verbs स्था 'to stand' ईश 'to rule', भास् 'to shine', पिस् 'to go' and कस 'to go'.

[936] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.176)
SANSKRIT: या प्रापणे अस्माद्यङन्तात्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु वरच्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix वरच् in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c' comes after the verb या when it ends with the affix यङ्.

[937] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.177)
SANSKRIT: भ्राजादिभ्यो धातुभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु कर्तृषु क्विप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix क्विप् comes, in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c.' after the verbs भ्राज् 'to shine' भास 'to shine', धुर्व 'to injure', द्युत् 'to shine', ऊर्ज 'to be strong', पॄ 'to fill', जु 'to move rapidly' and स्तु 'to praise', when it is preceded by the word ग्रावन् 'a stone'.

[938] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.178)
SANSKRIT: अन्येभ्योपि धातुभ्यस्तच्छीलादिषु क्विप्प्रत्ययो दृश्यते ॥
ENGLISH: The affix क्विप् is seen after other verbs also, besides those mentioned above, in the sense of 'the agent having such a habit &c'.

[939] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.179)
SANSKRIT: भवतेर्धातोः संज्ञायामन्तरे च गम्यमाने क्विप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix क्विप् comes after the verb भू 'to be' when the word so formed denotes a name or a surety.

[940] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.180)
SANSKRIT: वि प्र सम् इत्येवं पूर्वार्द्धवतेर्धातोः डुप्रत्ययो भवति न चेत् संज्ञा गम्यते ॥
ENGLISH: The affix डु comes after the verb भू when it is preceded by the _upasargas_ वि, प्र and सम् provided that the word to be formed does not mean an appellative.

[941] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.181)
SANSKRIT: धयतेर्दधातोश्च कर्मणि कारके ष्ट्रन्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix ष्ट्रन् comes, in denoting the object, after the verb धा 'to feed'.

[942] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.182)
SANSKRIT: दाप् नी शस यु युज स्तु तुद सि सिच मिह पत दश नह एतेभ्यो धातुभ्यः करणे कारके ष्ट्रन्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix ष्ट्रन्, with the sense of instrument, comes after the verbs दाप 'to cut', नी 'to lead', शस 'to hurt', यु 'to join', युज् 'to join', स्तु 'to praise', तुद 'to inflict pain', सि 'to bind', सिच् 'to sprinkle', मिह 'to urine', पत् 'to fall', दश 'to bite' and नह 'to bind'.

[943] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.183)
SANSKRIT: पूञ् पूङ् पवने, अस्माद्धातोः करणे कारके ष्ट्रन्प्रत्ययो भवति तच्चेत् करणं हलसूकरयोरवयवो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix ष्ट्रन् is employed after the verb पू with the sense of instrument when denoting a member of the body of a plough or of a hog.

[944] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.184)
SANSKRIT: अर्ति लू धू सू खन सह चर एतेभ्यो धातुभ्यः करणे कारके इत्रप्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix इत्र comes after the verbs ॠ 'to go', लू 'to cut', धू 'to shake', सू 'to bring forth', खन् 'to dig', सह् 'to bear', and चर 'to go' with the sense of instrument.

[945] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.185)
SANSKRIT: पवतेर्धातोः करणे कारके इत्रप्रत्ययो भवति समुदायेन चेत्संज्ञा गम्यते ॥
ENGLISH: The affix इत्र comes after the verb पू 'to purify' with the sense of the agent so expressed being the instrument; when the sense of the complete word is simply appellative, and not descriptive.

[946] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.186)
SANSKRIT: पुवः करणे कर्तरि च इत्रप्रत्ययो भवति, ऋषिदेवतयोर्यथासंख्यं संबन्धः ॥
ENGLISH: The affix इत्र comes after the verb पू 'to purify' in the sense of 'the agent or the instrument' when it is respectively employed in connection with a sage or a diety.

[947] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.187)
SANSKRIT: ञीतो धातोर्वर्तमानेऽर्थे क्तप्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The verbal roots, marked with an indicatory ञि, take the affix क्त, in denoting the present time.

[948] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.2.188)
SANSKRIT: मतिरिच्छा, बुद्धिर्ज्ञानम्, पूजा सत्कारः, एतदर्थेभ्यश्च धातुभ्यो वर्तमानार्थे क्तप्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: And after roots denoting inclination, understanding, or respect, the affix क्त is employed with the force of the present.

[949] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.1)
SANSKRIT: उणादयः प्रत्यया वर्त्तमानेऽर्थे संज्ञायां विषये बहुलं भवन्ति ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_Un_' and the rest, with the force of the present, and with a sense simply appellative, are attached diversely.

[950] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.2)
SANSKRIT: भूतकाले उणादयः प्रत्यया दृश्यन्ते ॥
ENGLISH: The '_Unadi_' affixes are seen also attached with the force of the past time.

[951] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.3)
SANSKRIT: भविष्यति काले गम्यादयः शब्दाः साधवो भवन्ति ॥
ENGLISH: The words 'gami', &c. are valid forms, having the sense of the future time.

[952] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.4)
SANSKRIT: यावत्पुराशब्दयोर्निपातयोरुपपदयोर्भविष्यति काले धातोर्लट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lat_' comes after a root, with the force of futurity, when it has in construction with it the particles '_yavat_' and '_pura_'.

[953] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.5)
SANSKRIT: काकर्हि इत्येतयोरुपपदयोर्विभाषा भविष्यति काले धातोर्लट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Laţ_' is optionally employed after a root with the force of the futurity, when it has in construction with it, the adverbs '_kada_' and '_karhi_'.

[954] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.6)
SANSKRIT: किंवृत्तउपपदे लिप्सायां भविष्यति काले धातोर्विभाषा लट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: When the word '_kim_' or its derivatives are in construction with the verb, the affix '_Lat_' is employed optionally after a root, in denoting future time, provided that the sentence expresses a desire of gaining on the part of the speaker.

[955] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.7)
SANSKRIT: लिप्स्यमानसिद्धौ गम्यमानायां भविष्यति काले धातोर्विभाषा लट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: And when the success, that would accrue to another by fulfilling the desire of the speaker, is indicated in a sentence, the present tense may optionally be employed with the force of the futurity.

[956] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.8)
SANSKRIT: लोडर्थः प्रैषादिर्लक्ष्यते येन स लोडर्थलक्षणे धात्वर्थः, तत्र वर्तमानाद्धातोर्भविष्यति काले विभाषा लट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lat_' is optionally employed with the force of the futurity, after that root, which in a conditional sentence, is the condition precedent for the action indicated by another verb having the sense of the imperative mood.

[957] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.9)
SANSKRIT: ऊर्ध्वमौहूर्त्तिकं भविष्यतिकाले लोडर्थलक्षणार्थे वर्तमानाद्धातोर्विभाषा लिङ्प्रत्ययो भवति, चकाराल्लट् ॥
ENGLISH: The '_Lat_' (present) or the '_Lin_' (potential) is used under similar conditions in denoting futurity, when the future time is future by a '_muhurta_' (48 minutes).

[958] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.10)
SANSKRIT: क्रियार्थायां क्रियायामुपपदे धातोर्भविष्यति काले तुमुन्ण्वुलौ प्रत्ययौ भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_tumun_' and '_nvul_' are placed after a verbal root, with the force of the future, when the word in construction therewith is another verb, denoting an action performed for the sake of the (future) action.

[959] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.11)
SANSKRIT: भावइति प्रकृत्य ये घञादयो विहितास्ते च भाववचना भविष्यतिकाले क्रियायामुपपदे क्रियार्थायां भवन्ति ॥
ENGLISH: And the affixes that are ordained to come after a root with the force of denoting the mere action of the verb, such as घञ् &c. (III. 1. 13.) have also the force of the future, when the word in construction therewith, is another verb denoting an action performed for the sake of the future action.

[960] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.12)
SANSKRIT: धातोरण्प्रत्ययो भवति भविष्यतिकाले कर्मण्युपपदे कियायां च क्रियार्थायाम् ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_an_' comes after a root with the force of the future, when the word in construction with it is in the accusative case, and when the action is performed for the sake of another action.

[961] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.13)
SANSKRIT: शेषे शुद्धे भविष्यतिकाले चकारात् क्रियायां चोपपदे क्रियार्थायां धातोर्लृट् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lrit_' is employed after a verb, in the remaining cases, where futurity pure and simple is indicated; and also where there is in construction with it another verb denoting an action performed for the sake of the future action.

[962] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.14)
SANSKRIT: लृटः स्थाने सत्संज्ञौ शतृशानचौ वा भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes called '_Sat_' i. e. '_satri_' and '_sanach_' are optionally the substitutes of '_Lrit_'.

[963] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.15)
SANSKRIT: भविष्यदनद्यतनेऽर्थे वर्त्तमानाधातोर्लुट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lut_' comes after a verbal root in the sense of what will happen, but not in the course of the current day.

[964] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.16)
SANSKRIT: पदादिभ्यो धातुभ्यो घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the roots '_pad_' (to pace), '_ruj_' (to pain), '_vis_' (to enter), and '_spris_' (to touch).

[965] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.17)
SANSKRIT: सर्त्तेर्द्धातोः स्थिरे कर्त्तरि घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the verb '_sri_' (to move) when the agent is permanently fixed.

[966] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.18)
SANSKRIT: भावे वाच्ये धातोर्घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after a root when mere action is denoted.

[967] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.19)
SANSKRIT: कर्तृवर्जिते कारके संज्ञायां विषये धातोर्घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: And the affix '_ghan_' comes after a root, when the sense is that of an appellative, the word being related to the verb from which its name is deduced, but not as agent.

[968] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.20)
SANSKRIT: परिमाणाख्यायां सर्वेभ्यो धातुभ्यो घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after all roots when the word so formed is the name of a measure.

[969] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.21)
SANSKRIT: इङो धातोर्घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the root '_in_' (to study).

[970] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.22)
SANSKRIT: उपसर्ग उपपदे रौतेर्धातोर्घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the verb '_ru_' (to roar), when it has an _upasarga_ in composition with it.

[971] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.23)
SANSKRIT: समि उपपदे यु द्रु दु इत्येतेभ्यो धातुभ्यो घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the roots '_yu_' (to join), '_dru_' (to run) and '_du_' (to burn), when in composition with the preposition '_sam_'.

[972] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.24)
SANSKRIT: श्रि णी भू इत्येतेभ्यो धातुभ्योऽनुपसर्गेभ्यो घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the roots '_sri_' (to go to) '_ņi_' (to lead) and '_bhu_' (to be), when not in composition with an _upasarga_.

[973] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.25)
SANSKRIT: वावुपपदे क्षु श्रु इत्येताभ्यां धातुभ्यां घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the roots '_kshu_' (to sneeze), and '_sru_' (to move and hear) when the preposition '_vi_' is in composition.

[974] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.26)
SANSKRIT: अव उत् इत्येतयोरुपपदयोर्नयतेर्धातोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the verb '_ni_' (to lead) when the prepositions '_ava_' and '_ut_' are in composition.

[975] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.27)
SANSKRIT: प्रेशब्द उपपदे द्रु स्तु स्रु इत्येतेभ्यो धातुभ्यो घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the roots '_dru_', '_stu_' and '_sru_', when the word in composition is '_pra_'.

[976] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.28)
SANSKRIT: निरभिपूर्वयोः पूल्वोर्धात्वोर्घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the roots '_pu_' (to purify) and '_lu_' (to cut) when '_nir_' and '_abhi_' are respectively in composition.

[977] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.29)
SANSKRIT: उन्न्योरुपपदयोः गॄ इत्येतस्माद्धातोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the root '_gri_' when the _upasargas_ '_ut_' and '_ni_' are in composition.

[978] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.30)
SANSKRIT: कॄ इत्येतस्माद्धातोरुन्न्योरुपपदयोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति धान्यविषयश्चेद्धात्वर्थो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the verb '_Kri_', when the prepositions '_ut_' and '_ni_' are in composition and when the sense of the verb relates to grain.

[979] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.31)
SANSKRIT: यज्ञविषये प्रयोगे संपूर्वात्स्तौतेर्घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the root '_stu_' when it is preceded by the _upasarga_ '_sam_' and the word refers to sacrificial subjects.

[980] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.32)
SANSKRIT: स्तृञ् आच्छादने अस्माद्धातोः प्रशब्दउपपदे घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति, नचेद्यज्ञविषयः प्रयोगो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the root '_stri_' (to cover), when preceded by the preposition '_pra_'; provided that the word so formed does not refer to sacrifice.

[981] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.33)
SANSKRIT: स्तृञ् आच्छादने अस्माद्धातोर्विशब्दउपपदे घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति प्रथने गम्यमाने तच्चेत्प्रथनं शब्दविषयं न भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the root '_stri_' (to cover), when the preposition '_vi_' is in composition with it, when the sense is that of extension, and when such spreading does not refer to words.

[982] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.34)
SANSKRIT: विपूर्वात्स्तृणातेश्छन्दोनाम्नि घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after '_stri_' with the _upasarga_ '_vi_', when the word so formed is the name of a metre.

[983] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.35)
SANSKRIT: उद्युपपदे ग्रहेर्धातोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the verb '_grah_' (to seize), when the preposition '_ut_' is in composition.

[984] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.36)
SANSKRIT: सम्युपपदे ग्रहेर्द्धातोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति मुष्टिविषयश्चेद्धात्वर्थो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the root '_grah_' when in composition with the preposition '_sam_' when the sense of the root refers to fist.

[985] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.37)
SANSKRIT: परिशब्दे निशब्दे चोपपदे यथासंख्यं निय इणश्च धातोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति, अचोपवादः, द्यूताभ्रेषयोः ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the roots '_ni_' (to lead), and '_i_' (to go), when the prepositions '_pari_' and '_ni_' are respectively in composition with them, and when the words so formed respectively mean 'a game' and 'propriety or arrangement or law'.

[986] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.38)
SANSKRIT: परिशब्द उपपदे इणो धातोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति अनुपात्यये गम्यमाने ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the root '_i_' (to go) in composition with the word '_pari_' when the sense is that of following in regular succession.

[987] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.39)
SANSKRIT: वि उप इत्येतयोरुपपदयोः शेतेर्धातोञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the root '_si_' (to lie down) when the prepositions '_vi_' and '_upa_' are in composition with it, and when the sense of the word so formed is that of 'regular succession'.

[988] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.40)
SANSKRIT: हस्तादाने गम्यमाने चिनोतेर्धातोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति, नचेत् स्तेयं चौर्यं भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the root '_chi_' (to collect), when the sense expressed is that of taking by hand, provided it does not refer to stealing.

[989] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.41)
SANSKRIT: निवास चिति शरीर उपसमाधान, एतेष्वर्थेषु चिनोतेर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति धातोरादेश्च ककार आदेशो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_', comes after the root '_chi_' (to gather), and '_k_' is the substitute of the initial '_ch_' in these senses viz.- 'a dwelling', 'a fire on the funeral pile', 'the body' and 'collection'.

[990] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.42)
SANSKRIT: संघे वाच्ये चिनोतेर्धातोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति आदेश्च कः ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the root '_chi_' (to gather) and '_k_' is the substitute of the initial '_ch_' in the sense of 'a multitude or assembly' (of living beings possessing some common characteristics), but not merely a confused crowd of men.

[991] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.43)
SANSKRIT: कर्मव्यतिहारे गम्यमाने धातोर्णच्प्रत्ययो भवति स्त्रीलिङ्गे वाच्ये ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_nach_' comes after a root in denoting reciprocity of action, and the word so formed is in the feminine gender.

[992] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.44)
SANSKRIT: अभिविधौ गम्यमाने धातोर्भावे इनुण्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_inun_' comes after a root in denoting condition, when co-extensiveness is meant.

[993] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.45)
SANSKRIT: अव नि इत्येतयोरुपपदयोर्ग्रहेर्धातोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति आक्रोशे गम्यमाने ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the verb '_grah_' (to seize), in composition with '_ava_', and '_ni_'; when malediction is meant.

[994] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.46)
SANSKRIT: प्रशब्दउपपदे ग्रहेर्धातोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति लिप्सायाम् गम्यमानायाम् ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the root '_grah_', when the word '_pra_' is in composition, and the sense denoted is the desire of acquisition.

[995] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.47)
SANSKRIT: परिशब्दउपपदे ग्रहेर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the root '_grah_', in composition with '_pari_' when it relates to sacrificial subjects.

[996] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.48)
SANSKRIT: निशब्दउपपदे वृ इत्येतस्माद्धातोर्धान्यविशेषेऽभिधेये घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the verb '_vri_' preceded by '_ni_'; when the sense is that of grain.

[997] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.49)
SANSKRIT: उच्छब्दउपपदे श्रयत्वादिभ्यो घञ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the verbs '_sri_', '_yu_', '_pu_' and '_dru_', when the preposition '_ut_' is in composition.

[998] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.50)
SANSKRIT: आङि उपपदे रौतेः प्लवतेश्च विभाषा घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' is optionally employed after the verbs '_ru_' (to roar) and '_plu_' (to float), when the preposition '_an_' is in composition.

[999] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.51)
SANSKRIT: अव उपपदे ग्रहेर्धातोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति विभाषा वर्षप्रतिबन्धेऽभिधेये ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' is optionally employed after the root '_grah_', when the word '_ava_' is in composition, the sense being witholding of rain.

[1000] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.52)
SANSKRIT: प्र शब्द उपपदे ग्रहेर्धातोर्विभाषा घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति प्रत्ययान्तवाच्यश्चेद् वणिजां सम्बन्धी भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' is optionally employed after the verb '_grah_' in composition with '_pra_', when the word so formed relates to commerce.

[1001] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.53)
SANSKRIT: प्र शब्दउपपदे ग्रहेर्धातोर्विभाषा घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति रश्मिश्चेत्प्रत्ययान्तेनाभिधीयते ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes optionally after the verb '_grah_' in composition with '_pra_', when the word so formed means 'a rein'.

[1002] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.54)
SANSKRIT: प्रशब्दउपपदे वृणोतेर्धातोर्विभाषा धञ् प्रत्ययो भवति प्रत्ययान्तं न चेदाच्छादनविशेष उच्यते ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes optionally after the verb '_vri_' (to choose), when '_pra_' is in composition, and the word so formed means 'a sort of covering'.

[1003] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.55)
SANSKRIT: परिशब्दउपपदे विभाषा घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति अवज्ञाने गम्यमाने ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' is optionally employed after the verb '_bhu_', the word '_pari_' being in construction, and the sense of the word so formed being 'disregard'.

[1004] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.56)
SANSKRIT: इवर्णान्ताद्धातोर्भावे अकर्तरि च कारके संज्ञायामच्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ach_' comes after a root ending in '_i_' or '_i_' (when mere action is denoted, or when the sense is that of an appellative, the word being related to the verb from which its name is deduced, but not as an agent).

[1005] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.57)
SANSKRIT: ॠकारान्तेभ्य उवर्णान्तेभ्यश्च अप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: After a root ending in long 'ri', short 'u', or long 'u', there is the affix 'ap'.

[1006] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.58)
SANSKRIT: ग्राहादिभ्यो धातुभ्यो ऽप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes after the verbs '_grah_', '_vri_', '_dri_', '_nischi_' and '_gam_'.

[1007] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.59)
SANSKRIT: उपसर्ग उपपदेऽदेर्धातोरप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes after the verb '_ad_' (to eat) when an _upasarga_ is in composition.

[1008] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.60)
SANSKRIT: निशब्द उपपदे अदेर्धातोर्णःप्रत्ययो भवति चकारादप् च ॥
ENGLISH: And the affix '_na_' as well as '_ap_', comes after the verb '_ad_' (to eat), when the _upasarga_ '_ni_' is in composition.

[1009] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.61)
SANSKRIT: व्यध जप इत्येतयोरनुपसर्गयोरप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes after the verbs '_vyadh_' and '_jap_', when no _upasarga_ is in composition with them.

[1010] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.62)
SANSKRIT: स्वनहसोरनुपसर्गयोर्वा अप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes optionally after the verbs '_svan_' and '_has_' when no _upasarga_ is in composition with them.

[1011] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.63)
SANSKRIT: सम् उप नि वि इत्येतेषूपपदेषु अनुपसर्गेऽपि यमेर्वा अप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: And the affix '_ap_' comes optionally after the verb '_yam_', when the _upasargas_ '_sam_', '_upa_', '_ni_' and '_vi_' are in composition; or even when it is _upasarga_-less.

[1012] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.64)
SANSKRIT: निराब्द उपपदे गद गद पठ स्वन इत्येतेभ्यो धातुभ्यो वा अप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes optionally after the verbs '_gad_' (to speak), '_nad_' (to sound), '_path_' (to read), '_svan_' (to sound), when the _upasarga_ '_ni_' is in composition with them.

[1013] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.65)
SANSKRIT: क्वणतेर्धातोर्निपूर्वादनुपसर्गाच्च वीणायां वा अप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes optionally after the verb '_kvan_' (to jingle), when '_ni_' is in composition with it, as well as when it is without any _upasarga_, or when 'flute' is meant.

[1014] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.66)
SANSKRIT: पण व्यवहारे स्तुतौ च, अस्माद्धातोर्नित्यमप्प्रत्ययो भवति परिमाणे गम्यमाने ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes invariably after the verb '_pan_' (to barter), when the sense is that of measure.

[1015] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.67)
SANSKRIT: मदेर्धातोरनुपसर्गादप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes after the verb '_mad_', when not in composition with an _upasarga_.

[1016] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.68)
SANSKRIT: प्रमद सम्मद इत्येतौ निपात्येते हर्षेऽभिधेये ॥
ENGLISH: The words '_pramada_' and '_sammada_' are irregularly formed, meaning joy'.

[1017] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.69)
SANSKRIT: समुदोरुपपदयोरजतेर्द्धातोः पशुविषये धात्वर्थेऽप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix _ap_ comes after the verb '_aj_' (to go), when the prepositions '_sam_' and '_ut_' are in composition, and the word so formed refers to beasts.

[1018] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.70)
SANSKRIT: ग्लह इति निपात्यते अक्षविषयश्चेद्धात्वर्थो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The word '_glaha_' is irregularly formed, when the sense of the root refers to gambling.

[1019] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.71)
SANSKRIT: सर्त्तेर्धातोः प्रजने विषये अप्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes after the verb '_sri_' (to flow), in the sense of impregnating (the covering of cows &c).

[1020] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.72)
SANSKRIT: नि अभि उप वि इत्येतेषु उपपदेषु ह्वयतेर्द्धातोः संप्रसारणम् अप् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes after the verb '_hve_' (to call), when the preposition '_ni_' '_abhi_' '_upa_' and '_vi_' are in composition with it, and its semivowel is changed into the corresponding vowel.

[1021] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.73)
SANSKRIT: आङ् उपपदे ह्वयतेर्द्धातोः संप्रसारणमप् प्रत्ययो भवति युद्धेऽभिधेये ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes after the verb '_hve_' when the word in composition is the _upasarga_ '_an_', and the semi-vowel of the root is changed into its corresponding vowel, when the word so formed means battle.

[1022] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.74)
SANSKRIT: आङ्पूर्वस्य ह्वयतेर्द्धातोः संप्रसारणमप्प्रत्ययो वृद्धिश्च निपात्यते निपानं चेदभिधेयं भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The word '_ahava_' is irregularly formed when meaning a trough.

[1023] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.75)
SANSKRIT: अनुपसर्गस्य ह्वयतेः संप्रसारणमप्प्रत्ययो भवति भावेऽभिधेये ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes after the verb '_hve_' and there is the change of the semi-vowel to its corresponding vowel, when the root is _upasarga_-less, and mere action is denoted.

[1024] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.76)
SANSKRIT: हन्तेर्द्धातोरनुपसर्गे भावे अप्प्रत्ययो भवति, तत्संनियोगेन च वधादेशः, सचान्तोदात्तः ।
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes after the root '_han_' when _upasarga_-less, in the sense of mere action, and '_vadha_' is the substitute of '_han_' before this affix.

[1025] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.77)
SANSKRIT: मूर्त्तावभिधेयायां हन्तेरप्प्रत्ययो भवति, पश्चादेशः ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes after the verb '_han_', when the word so formed means solidity, and '_ghan_' is the substitute.

[1026] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.78)
SANSKRIT: अन्तःपूर्वाद्धन्तेरप्प्रत्ययो भवति घनादेशश्च भवति देशेऽभिधेये ॥
ENGLISH: The verb '_han_' preceded by the word '_antar_' takes the affix '_ap_', and '_ghan_' is the substitute of the word '_han_', when the word so formed means 'a country'.

[1027] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.79)
SANSKRIT: पूर्वस्य हन्तेः प्रघण प्रघाण इत्येतौ शब्दौ निपात्येते अगारैकदेशे वाच्ये ॥
ENGLISH: The words '_praghana_' and '_praghana_' are irregularly formed meaning 'a portion of a dwelling house'.

[1028] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.80)
SANSKRIT: उत्पूर्वस्य हन्तेरुद्घन इति निपात्यतेऽत्याधानं चेद् भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The word '_udghana_' is irregularly formed in the sense of 'bench'.

[1029] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.81)
SANSKRIT: अपपूर्वस्य हन्तेरपघन इति निपात्यते, अङ्गं चेत्तद्भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The word '_apaghana_' is irregularly formed meaning 'a member of the body'.

[1030] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.82)
SANSKRIT: अयस् वि द्रु इत्येतेषूपपदेषु हन्तेर्धातोः करणे कारकेऽप्प्रत्ययो भवति, घनादेशश्च ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes after the verb '_han_' when the words '_ayas_', '_vi_' or '_dru_' are in composition with it, when the word so formed is related to the verb as an instrument, and '_ghan_' is the substitute of '_han_'.

[1031] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.83)
SANSKRIT: स्तम्बशब्द उपपदे करणे कारके हन्तेः कः प्रत्ययो भवति चकारादप् ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ka_' also comes after the verb '_han_', when '_stamba_' (a clump) is the word in composition, and the relation of the word so formed to the verb is that of an instrument.

[1032] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.84)
SANSKRIT: परिशब्दउपपदे हन्तेर्द्धातोरप्प्रत्ययो भवति करणेकारके घशब्दश्चादेशः ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ap_' comes after the verb '_han_', when the _upasarga_ '_pari_' is in composition, and the relation between the word so formed, and the verb, is that of an instrument, and '_gha_' replaces '_han_'.

[1033] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.85)
SANSKRIT: उपपूर्वस्य हन्तेरप्प्रत्यय उपधालोपश्च निपात्यते ॥
ENGLISH: The word '_upaghna_' is irregularly formed meaning 'an inclined place for leaning or support'.

[1034] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.86)
SANSKRIT: समुदोरुपपदयोर्हन्तेर्द्धातोरप्प्रत्ययष्टिलोपो षत्वं च निपात्यते, यथासंख्यं गणेऽभिधेये प्रशंसायां गम्यमानायाम् ॥
ENGLISH: The words '_sangha_' and '_udgha_' are irregularly formed in the sense of 'a collection', and 'a praise' respectively.

[1035] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.87)
SANSKRIT: निघ इति निपूर्वाद्धन्तेरप्प्रत्ययष्टिलोपो घत्वं च निपात्यते निमितं चेदभिधेयं भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The word '_nigha_' is irregularly formed in the sense of 'as high as broad'.

[1036] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.88)
SANSKRIT: डु इद्यस्य तस्माद् ड्वितो धातोः क्तिः प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ktri_' comes after the verb which has an indicatory '_du_', when denoting mere action &c.

[1037] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.89)
SANSKRIT: टु इद्यस्य तस्मात् ट्वितो धातोरथुच् प्रत्ययो भवति भावादौ ॥
ENGLISH: After that verb which has an indicatory '_tu_', the affix '_athuch_' comes with the force of denoting mere action &c.

[1038] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.90)
SANSKRIT: यजादिभ्यो धातुभ्यो नाङ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: After the verbs '_yaj_' (to worship), '_yach_' (to ask for), '_yat_' (to strive), '_vichchh_' (to shine), '_prachchh_' (to ask) and '_raksh_' (to preserve), comes the affix '_nan_' with the force of denoting mere action &c.

[1039] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.91)
SANSKRIT: स्वपेर्धातोर्नन् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_nan_' comes, under similar circumstances after the verb '_svap_' (to sleep).

[1040] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.92)
SANSKRIT: उपसर्गे उपपदे घुसंज्ञकेभ्यो धातुभ्यः किःप्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ki_' comes under similar conditions, after a '_ghu_' verb (I. 1. 20), when an _upasarga_ is in 'composition with it.

[1041] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.93)
SANSKRIT: कर्मण्युपपदे घुसंज्ञकेभ्यो धातुभ्यः किःप्रत्ययो भवति, अधिकरणे कारके ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ki_' comes after a '_ghu_' verb, when a word in the accusative case is in composition with it, and when the relation of the word so formed to its verb, is that of 'location'.

[1042] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.94)
SANSKRIT: स्त्रीलिङ्गे भावादौ धातोः क्तिन् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: To express an action &c. by a word in the feminine gender, the affix '_ktin_' is added to the root.

[1043] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.95)
SANSKRIT: स्थादिभ्यो धातुभ्यः स्त्रीलिङ्गे भावे क्तिन् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: After the roots '_stha_' (to stand), '_ga_' (to sing) '_pa_' (to drink) and '_pach_' (to cook), the affix '_ktin_' is employed, when a word in the feminine gender denoting a 'mere action' is to be expressed.

[1044] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.96)
SANSKRIT: मन्त्रे विषये वृषादिभ्यो धातुभ्यः क्तिन्प्रत्ययो भवति उदात्तः ॥
ENGLISH: In _Mantra_ literature, '_ktin_' acutely accented comes after the following roots, forming words in the feminine gender, denoting a mere action:-'_vrish_'(to rain), '_ish_'(to wish), '_pach_' (to cook), '_man_' (to think), '_vid_' (to know), '_bhu_'(to be), '_vi_' (to go, to consume) and '_ra_' (to give).

[1045] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.97)
SANSKRIT: उत्यादयः शब्दा निपात्यन्ते ॥
ENGLISH: And these words viz. '_uti_' (preserving sport), '_yuti_' (joining), '_juti_' (velocity), '_sati_', (destruction), '_heti_' (a weapon) and '_kirti_' (fame) are anomalous forms, acutely accented.

[1046] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.98)
SANSKRIT: व्रजयजोर्धात्वोः स्त्रिलिंगे भावे क्यप् प्रत्ययो भवति, उदात्तः ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_kyap_' comes after the roots '_vraj_' (to go) and '_yaj_' (to worship) acutely accented in forming a word in the feminine denoting action.

[1047] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.99)
SANSKRIT: समजादिभ्यो धातुभ्यः स्त्रियां क्यप् प्रत्ययो भवति उदात्तः संज्ञायां विषये ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_kyap_' comes after the following verbs in forming a word in the feminine denoting an appellative and is acutely accented viz :-'_sam_-_aj_' '_nishad_', '_ni_-_pat_', '_man_', '_vid_', '_sun_, _sin_', '_bhrin_' and '_in_'.

[1048] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.100)
SANSKRIT: करोतेर्धातोः स्त्रियां शः प्रत्ययो भवति चकारात् क्यप् च ॥
ENGLISH: And after the root '_kri_' comes the affix '_sa_' in forming a feminine, as well as the affix '_kyap_'.

[1049] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.101)
SANSKRIT: इषेर्धातोः शः प्रत्ययो यागभावश्च निपात्यते ॥
ENGLISH: The form '_ichchha_' (desire) is irregular.

[1050] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.102)
SANSKRIT: प्रत्ययान्तेभ्यो धातुभ्यः स्त्रियामकारः प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: After the verbs that end in an affix, there is the affix '_a_', the word being feminine.

[1051] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.103)
SANSKRIT: हलन्तो यो धातुर्गुरुमान् ततः स्त्रियामकारः प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_a_' comes after that verb which has a prosodially heavy vowel and ends in a consonant, when the word to be formed is feminine.

[1052] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.104)
SANSKRIT: षिद्भ्यो भिदादिभ्यश्च स्त्रियामङ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_an_' comes after those verbs that have an indicatory '_sh_', and after '_bhid_' &c, when the word to be formed is feminine.

[1053] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.105)
SANSKRIT: चिन्ति पूजि कथि कुम्बि चर्च एभ्यो धातुभ्यो युचि प्राप्ते स्त्रियामङ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_an_' as well as the affix '_yuch_' comes after the following verbs, forming feminine words:- '_chint_' (to think), '_puj_' (to worship) '_kath_' (to narrate), '_kumb_' (to cover) and '_charch_' (to learn).

[1054] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.106)
SANSKRIT: आकारान्तेभ्य उपसर्गे उपपदे स्त्रियामङ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_an_' comes after those verbs which end in long '_a_' when an _upasarga_ is in composition, and when the word to be formed is feminine.

[1055] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.107)
SANSKRIT: ण्यन्तेभ्यो धातुभ्य आसश्रन्थ इत्येताभ्यां च स्त्रियां युच्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: After verbs ending in '_ni_', and after '_as_' (to sit) and '_sranth_' (to loose), there is the affix '_yuch_' when the word to be formed is feminine.

[1056] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.108)
SANSKRIT: रोगाख्यायां गम्यमानायां धातोर्बहुलं ण्वुल्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_nvul_' comes diversely after verbs when the word to be formed is a feminine noun, begin the name of 'diseases'.

[1057] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.109)
SANSKRIT: संज्ञायां विषये धातोर्ण्वुल्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_nvul_' comes after the verbal roots, when the word to be formed is an appellative.

[1058] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.110)
SANSKRIT: परिप्रश्ने आख्याने च गम्यमाने धातोरिञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: And the affix '_in_' comes optionally after a root, when a question and answer is expressed, (as well as '_nvul_' and other affixes ordained by other rules).

[1059] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.111)
SANSKRIT: एतेष्वर्थेषु धातोर्ण्वुच्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_nvuch_' comes optionally after a root in the sense of succession, merit, debt or production.

[1060] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.112)
SANSKRIT: आक्रोशे गम्यमाने नञ्युपपदे धातोरनिःप्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ani_' comes after a verb when the particle '_nan_' is in composition with it, and the sense implied is that of cursing.

[1061] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.113)
SANSKRIT: कृत्यसंज्ञकाः प्रत्यया ल्युट् च बहुलमर्थेषु भवन्ति ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes called '_kritya_' (111. 1. 95) and the affix '_lyut_', are diversely applicable and have other senses than those taught before.

[1062] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.114)
SANSKRIT: नपुंसकलिङ्गे भावे धातोर्ल्युट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_kta_' is added to the root, when action is expressed, the word being in the neuter gender.

[1063] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.115)
SANSKRIT: नपुंसकलिङ्गे भावे धातोर्ल्युट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_lyut_' is added to the root, when the name of an action is expressed, in the neuter gender.

[1064] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.116)
SANSKRIT: येन कर्मणा संस्पृश्यमानस्य कर्तुःशरीरसुखमुत्पद्यते तस्मिन्कर्मण्युपपदेर्धातोर्नपुंसकलिंगे भावे ल्युट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_lyut_' is added to a root, when the name of an action is expressed in the neuter gender; provided that the verb has in construction with it, such a word in the accusative case, as indicates the thing, from the contact with which, there arises a pleasant sensation corporally to the agent.

[1065] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.117)
SANSKRIT: करणेऽधिकरणे च कारके धातोर्ल्युट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_lyut_' comes after a root, when the relation of the word to be formed to the verb is that of an instrument or location.

[1066] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.118)
SANSKRIT: पुंल्लिङ्गयोः करणाधिकरणयोरभिधेययोर्धातोः प्रत्ययो भवति समुदायेन चेत् संज्ञा गम्यते ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_gha_' generally comes in the sense of an instrument or location after a root, when the word to be formed is a name and is in the masculine gender.

[1067] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.119)
SANSKRIT: गोचरादयः शब्दा घप्रत्ययान्ता निपात्यन्ते पूर्वस्मिन्नेवार्थे ॥
ENGLISH: And the words '_gochara_', '_samchara_', '_vaha_' '_vraja_', '_vyaja_', '_apana_' and '_nigama_' are anomalous.

[1068] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.120)
SANSKRIT: अव उपपदे तरतेस्तृणातेश्च धातोः करणाधिकरणयोः संज्ञायां घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ghan_' comes after the roots '_tri_' (to cross) and '_stri_' (to spread), when the _upasarga_ '_ava_' is in composition with them, and when the word so formed is an appellative related to the verb either as an instrument or as a location.

[1069] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.121)
SANSKRIT: हलन्ताद्धातोः करणाधिकरणयोर्घञ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: And after a verb ending in a consonant, comes the affix '_ghan_',(when the word to be formed is masculine, and related to the verb as an instrument or a location, and thereby the palatal is changed into a guttural).

[1070] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.122)
SANSKRIT: अध्यायादयः शब्दा घञन्ता निपात्यन्ते ॥
ENGLISH: And the words '_adhyaya_', '_nyaya_', '_udyava_', '_samhara_', '_adhara_' and '_avaya_' are anomalous.

[1071] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.123)
SANSKRIT: उदङ्क इति निपात्यते अनुदक विषयश्चेत् धात्वर्थो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The word '_udanka_' is anomalous, when the sense of the root refers to subjects other than 'water'.

[1072] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.124)
SANSKRIT: आनाय इति निपात्यते जालं चेत्तद्भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The word '_anaya_' is irregularly formed when meaning 'a net'.

[1073] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.125)
SANSKRIT: खनतेर्द्धातोः करणाधिकरणयोर्घःप्रत्ययो भवति, चकाराद् घञ् च ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_gha_' as well as '_ghan_' comes after the verb '_khan_' (to dig), (when the word to be formed is an appellative related to the verb as instrument or location).

[1074] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.126)
SANSKRIT: ईषत् दुस् सु इत्येतेषूपपदेषु कृच्छ्राकृच्छ्रार्थेषु धातोः खल् प्रत्ययो भवति
ENGLISH: In the sense of 'hard and difficult' or 'light and easy', the affix '_khal_' is added to a verb, when '_ishad_' and '_dur_' and '_su_' are combined with it as _upapadas_.

[1075] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.127)
SANSKRIT: भवतेः करोतेश्च धातोर्यथासंख्यं कर्तरि कर्मणि चोपपदे चकारादीषदादिषु च खल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_khal_' comes after the verbs '_bhu_' and '_kri_', when the _upapadas_ in composition with them are 'agent' and 'object' respectively, preceded by the words '_ishad_' &c. in combination with them, meaning 'hard or light'.

[1076] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.128)
SANSKRIT: कृच्छ्राकृच्छ्रार्थेषु ईषदादिषूपपदेषु आकारान्तेभ्यो धातुभ्यो युच् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_yuch_' comes after roots ending in long 'a', (when '_ishad_', '_dur_' and '_su_' are combined as _upapadas_, in the sense of easily or with difficulty).

[1077] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.129)
SANSKRIT: ईषदादिषु कृच्छ्राकृच्छ्रार्थेषूपपदेषु गत्यर्थेभ्यो धातुभ्यश्छन्दसि विषये युच् प्रत्ययो भवति॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_yuch_' comes in the _Chhandas_, after roots having the sense of 'to go', when the word '_ishad_' &c. meaning 'lightly' or 'with difficulty' are in composition with such verbs.

[1078] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.130)
SANSKRIT: अन्येभ्योऽपि धातुभ्यो गत्यर्थेभ्यश्छन्दसि विषये युच् प्रत्ययो दृश्यते ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_yuch_' is seen to come in the _Vedas_, after other verbs also, than those meaning 'to go'.

[1079] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.131)
SANSKRIT: वर्त्तमानसमीपे भूते भविष्यति च वर्त्तमानाद्धातोर्वर्त्तमानवत्प्रत्ययो वा भवन्ति ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes which are employed when the sense is that of present time, may, optionally in like manner, be employed when the sense is that of past or future time not remote from the present.

[1080] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.132)
SANSKRIT: भविष्यति काले आशंसायां गम्यमानायां धातोर्वा भूतवत् प्रत्यया भवन्ति चकाराद् वर्त्तमानवच्च ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes which are employed, when the sense is that of the past time or of the present time, may, optionally, in like manner, be employed, after a root in denoting future time, when hope is expressed.

[1081] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.133)
SANSKRIT: क्षिप्रवचन उपपदे आशंसायां गम्यमानायां धातोर्लृट् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: When the word '_kshipra_' (quickly) or its synonym is in construction with the verb, the future affix, '_Lrit_' is employed after the root, when 'hope' is expressed in a conditional form.

[1082] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.134)
SANSKRIT: आशंसा येनोच्यते तदाशंसावचनं तस्मिन्नुपपदे धातोर्लिङ्प्रत्ययो भवति॥
ENGLISH: The affix of the Potential is employed in denoting Futurity, after a root, when the _upapada_ in composition with it, is a word expressing 'hope'.

[1083] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.135)
SANSKRIT: अनद्यतनवत् प्रत्ययविधिर्न भवति क्रियाप्रबन्धे सामीप्ये च गम्यमाने ॥
ENGLISH: When constant continuance of action or a near Past or Future is meant, the Past and Future are not denoted as taught in (III. 2. 111) and (III. 3. 15), through the Imperfect and the Second Future, but through the Aorist and the First Future.

[1084] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.136)
SANSKRIT: भविष्यति काले मर्यादावचनेऽवरस्मिन् प्रविभागेऽनद्यतनवत् प्रत्ययविधिर्न भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The Futurity is not expressed, as taught in (III. 3. 15), through the Second Future, but through the First Future, when a statement is made of a limit on this (_avara_) side of another place.

[1085] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.137)
SANSKRIT: कालमर्यादाविभागे सत्यवरस्मिन्विभागे भविष्यति कालेऽनद्यतनवत् प्रत्ययविधिर्न भवति, न वेदहोरात्रसम्बन्धी विभागस्तेषां च विभागे प्रतिषेधः ॥
ENGLISH: The Second Future is employed instead of the First Future, in denoting Future time not belonging to the current day, when the word '_avara_' is used together with a word expressing division of time, but not when it is a word giving the sense of 'day' or 'night'.

[1086] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.138)
SANSKRIT: कालमर्यादाविभागे सति भविष्यति काले परस्मिन् प्रविभागे विभाषाऽनद्यतनवत् प्रत्ययविधिर्न भवति, न चेदहोरात्रसम्बन्धी प्रविभागः ॥
ENGLISH: Optionally so, when a declaration is made with regard to that side of a limit of time.

[1087] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.139)
SANSKRIT: हेतुहेतुमतोर्लिङित्येवमादिकं लिङो निमित्तं, तत्र लिङ् निमित्ते भविष्यति काले लृङ् प्रत्ययो भवति, क्रियातिपत्तौ सत्याम् ॥
ENGLISH: Where there is a reason for affixing '_Lin_' the affix '_Lrin_' is employed in the Future tense when the non-completion of the action is to be understood.

[1088] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.140)
SANSKRIT: भूते च काले लिङ् निमित्ते क्रियातिपत्तौ सत्याम् लृङ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: And (where there is a reason for affixing '_Lin_', the affix '_Lrin_' is to be employed, when the non-completion of the action is to be understood) if the sense is that of past time.

[1089] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.141)
SANSKRIT: उताप्योः समर्थयोर्लिङिति वक्ष्यति प्रागेतस्मात् सूत्रावधेर्यदित ऊर्ध्वमनुक्रमिष्यामः, तत्र भूते लिङ्निमित्ते क्रियातिपत्तौ लृङ् वा भवतीत्येतदधिकृतं वेदितव्यम् ॥
ENGLISH: From this point as far as _sutra_ (III. 3. 152) (the whole of the following sentence is to be taken as exerting a governing influence on the _sutras_ that follow: where there is a reason for affixing '_Lin_', the '_Lrin_' may be) optionally (employed in denoting past time, when the non-completion of the action is to be understood).

[1090] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.142)
SANSKRIT: गर्हायां गम्यमानायाम् अपिजात्वोरुपपदयोर्धातोर्लट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lat_' is employed after a root, when it has in composition with it the words '_api_' or '_jatu_', the sense implied by the sentence being that of 'censure'.

[1091] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.143)
SANSKRIT: कथंशब्द उपपदे गर्हायां गम्यमानायां धातोर्लिङ्प्रत्ययो भवति, चकाराल्लट्च ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' as well as '_Lat_' is optionally employed after a root, when the word '_katham_' is in construction with it, and censure is implied.

[1092] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.144)
SANSKRIT: किंवृत्तउपपदे गर्हायां गम्यमानायां धातोर्लिङ्लृटौ प्रत्ययौ भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_Lin_' and '_Lrit_' come after a verb, when the interrogative words like '_kim_' &c, are in composition with it, and censure is implied.

[1093] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.145)
SANSKRIT: किंवृत्तेऽकिंवृत्ते चोपपदेऽनवक्लृप्त्यमर्षयोर्द्धातोर्लिङ्लृटौ प्रत्ययौ भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: When it is to be expressed that somebody holds that something is not likely to take place, or is not to be tolerated, the Potential and the First Future are employed, even without the Interrogative Pronoun.

[1094] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.146)
SANSKRIT: किंकिलास्त्यर्थेषूपपदेषु अनवक्लृप्त्यमर्षयोर्धातोर्लृट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lrit_' (the First Future) is used after a root, when the words '_kimkila_' or those having the sense of '_asti_' (he is) are in construction with it, (when the action is not likely to occur, or is not to be tolerated).

[1095] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.147)
SANSKRIT: जातु यदित्येतयोरुपपदयोरनवक्लृप्त्ययमर्षयोर्गम्यमानयोर्धातोर्लिङ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' comes after a root, the words '_jatu_' and '_yat_' being in construction with it, when the sense is that the action is not believed to be likely, or is not to be tolerated.

[1096] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.148)
SANSKRIT: यच्चयत्र इत्येतयोरुपपदयोरनवक्लृप्त्यमर्षयोर्गम्यमानयोर्धातोर्लिङ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' comes after a root, the words '_yachcha_' and '_yatra_' being in construction, when the sense is that the action is not believed to be likely, or not to be tolerated.

[1097] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.149)
SANSKRIT: यच्चयत्र इत्येतयोरुपपदयोर्धातोर्लिङ्प्रत्ययो भवति गर्हायाम् गम्यमानायाम् ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' comes after a root in all tenses when the words '_yachcha_' and '_yatra_' are in composition with it, provided that censure is implied.

[1098] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.150)
SANSKRIT: यच्चयत्रयोरुपपदयोश्चित्रीकरणे गम्यमाने धातोर्लिङ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' comes in all tenses after a root, when used with the words '_yachcha_' and '_yatra_' and the sense implied is that of 'wonder'.

[1099] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.151)
SANSKRIT: शेषेउपपदे चित्रीकरणे गम्यमाने धातोर्लृट्प्रत्ययो भवति यदिशब्दश्चेन्न प्रयुज्यते ॥
ENGLISH: In all other cases, when wonder is implied by other words than '_yachcha_' and '_yatra_', the affix '_Lrit_' is employed after a root, except when the word '_yadi_' is used.

[1100] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.152)
SANSKRIT: उत अपि इत्येतयोः समर्थयोर्द्धातोर्लिङ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' comes after a verb in all tenses, when the words '_uta_' and '_api_', both having the same meaning, are in composition.

[1101] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.153)
SANSKRIT: काम इच्छाभिलाष इत्यर्थान्तरम्, तस्य प्रवेदनं प्रकाशनम्, तस्मिन् गम्यमानेऽकच्चिदुपपदे धातोर्लिङ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' comes after a root, in expressing or making known of a wish, except when the word '_kachchit_' is in composition with it.

[1102] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.154)
SANSKRIT: संभावनं, क्रियासु योग्यताध्यवसानंशक्तिश्रद्धानमं, तदिदानीमलमर्थेन विशेष्यते, तच्चेत् संभावनं पर्याप्तमवितथं भवति, सिद्धाप्रयोग इत्यलमो विशेषणं, सिद्धश्चेदलमोऽप्रयोगः, क्वचासौ सिद्धः, यत्र गम्यते चार्थो नचासौ प्रयुज्यते, तदीदृशे सम्भावनोपाधिकेऽर्थे वर्त्तमानाद्धातोर्लिङ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' is employed after a root, when the expectation (of a person or thing being able or competent to do or suffer the action denoted by the verb) is implied (or expressed by any other word used along with them) than '_alam_'.

[1103] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.155)
SANSKRIT: सम्भावनवचने धातावुपपदे यच्छब्दवर्जिते धातोर्विभाषा लिङ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' is optionally employed after a verb when it has another verb which expresses 'expectation', in construction with it, but not so when the word '_yat_' is used.

[1104] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.156)
SANSKRIT: हेतुभूते हेतुमति चार्थे वर्त्तमानाद् धातोर्लिङ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' is optionally employed after both those verbs which express the condition and its consequence.

[1105] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.157)
SANSKRIT: इच्छार्थेषु धातुषूपपदेषु धातोर्लिङ्लोटौ प्रत्ययौ भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_Lin_' and '_Lot_' are employed after a root; when another verb having the sense of 'wishing', is in construction with it.

[1106] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.158)
SANSKRIT: इच्छार्थेषु धातुषु समानकर्तृकेषूपपदेषु धातोस्तुमुन् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_tumun_' comes after a verb, when another verb meaning 'to wish' is in construction, provided that the agent of both the verbs is the same.

[1107] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.159)
SANSKRIT: इच्छार्थेषु समानकर्तृकेषु धातुषूपपदेषु धातोर्लिङ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affx '_Lin_' is used after a verb when verbs meaning 'to wish' are in construction with it, and the agent of both the verbs is the same.

[1108] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.160)
SANSKRIT: इच्छार्थेभ्यो धातुभ्यो वर्त्तमाने काले विभाषा लिङ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: After roots meaning 'to wish', the Potential (_Lin_) is optionally used in denoting the present time.

[1109] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.161)
SANSKRIT: विध्याद्यर्थेषु धातोर्लिङ्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' comes after a verb, when the agent either commands, invites, permits, politely expresses a wish, asks questions, or prays.

[1110] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.162)
SANSKRIT: लोट्प्रत्ययो भवति धातोर्विध्यादिष्वर्थेषु
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lot_' also is employed after a root in the sense of commanding, &c.

[1111] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.163)
SANSKRIT: प्रेषणं प्रैषः, कामचाराभ्यनुज्ञानमतिसर्गः, निमित्तभूतस्य कालस्यावसरः प्राप्तकालः, एतेष्वर्थेषु धातोः कृत्यसंज्ञकाः प्रत्यया भवन्ति ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes called '_Kritya_', and the affix '_Lot_' come also after verbs, in the sense of direction, granting permission, and proper (particular) time.

[1112] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.164)
SANSKRIT: प्रैषादिषु गम्यमानेषु ऊर्ध्वमौहूर्तिकेऽर्थे वर्तमानाद्धातोर्लिङ् प्रत्ययो भवति चकाराद्यथा प्राप्तञ्च ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' (as well as the '_Kritya_' and '_Lot_') is used (under similar circumstances in the sense of direction, permission &c.) when the time is future by a _Muhurta_ (48 minutes or an Indian hour); (or the Potential may be used as well, when it signifies 'at this very moment').

[1113] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.165)
SANSKRIT: स्म शब्दउपपदे प्रैषादिषु गम्यमानेषूर्ध्वमौहूर्तिकेऽर्थे वर्त्तमानाद्धातोर्लोट्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lot_' comes after a verb, when the word '_sma_' is in composition; (when the sense is that of 'direction' permission) &c. and referring to time future by a _Muhurta_).

[1114] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.166)
SANSKRIT: स्म शब्दउपपदेऽधीष्टे गम्यमाने धातोर्लोट् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: And when 'wish' is meant (the Imperative may be used when the word '_sma_' is in composition with the verb).

[1115] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.167)
SANSKRIT: कालादिषूपपदेषु धातोस्तुमुन्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_tumun_' comes after a root, when the words '_kala_', '_samaya_', and '_vela_' (all meaning time) are in composition.

[1116] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.168)
SANSKRIT: यच्छब्दे उपपदे कालादिषु धातोर्लिङ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lin_' comes after a root, when the word '_yad_' is in composition, and the words '_kala_', &c. occur in construction.

[1117] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.169)
SANSKRIT: अर्हे कर्त्तरिवाच्ये गम्यमाने वा धातोः कृत्यतृचः प्रत्यया भवन्ति ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_kritya_', and the affix '_trich_' are added to a root, when fitness as regards the agent is implied, as well as the affix '_lin_').

[1118] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.170)
SANSKRIT: अवश्यंभावविशिष्टे आधमर्ण्यविशिष्टे च कर्त्तरिवाच्ये धातोर्णिनिप्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_nini_' is added to the root in denoting agent, showing that there is some 'necessity' or indebtedness or obligation on the part of the agent in connection with the action denoted by the verb.

[1119] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.171)
SANSKRIT: कृत्यसंज्ञकाश्च प्रत्यया आवश्यकाधमर्ण्ययोरुपाधिभूतयोर्धातोर्भवन्ति ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes called '_kritya_' also come after a root when the sense to be indicated is that of 'necessity or obligation'.

[1120] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.172)
SANSKRIT: शक्नोत्यर्थोपाधिके धात्वर्थे लिङ्प्रत्ययो भवति चकारात् कृत्याश्च ॥
ENGLISH: And the affix '_Lin_' as well as the '_kritya_' affixes come after a verb, when the sense is that of 'capability'.

[1121] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.173)
SANSKRIT: आशीर्विशिष्टेऽर्थे वर्त्तमानाद्धातोर्लिङ्लोटौ प्राययौ भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_Lin_' and '_Loti_' come after a verb by which 'benediction' is intended.

[1122] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.174)
SANSKRIT: आशिषि विषये धातोः क्तिच्क्तौ प्रत्ययौ भवतः समुदायेन चेत्संज्ञा गम्यते ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_ktich_' and '_kta_' are employed after a root, when benediction is intended, provided that the whole word so formed, is an appellative.

[1123] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.175)
SANSKRIT: माङ्युपपदे धातोर्लुङ् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lun_' comes after a verb when the word '_man_' is used in connection with it.

[1124] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.3.176)
SANSKRIT: स्म शब्दोत्तरे माङ्युपपदे धातोर्लङ् प्रत्ययो भवति चकाराल्लुङ् च ॥
ENGLISH: When the word '_man_' is followed by '_sma_', the affix '_Lan_' as well as '_Lun_' may be employed after a verbal root.

[1125] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.1)
SANSKRIT: धात्वर्थानां सम्बन्धो धातुसम्बन्धः, विशेषणविशेषभावः, तस्मिन्सति अयथाकालोक्ता अपि प्रत्ययाः साधवो भवन्ति ॥
ENGLISH: When there is a syntactical relation between the senses of the verbs, the affixes are valid, even in denoting time other than that for which they have been specifically enjoined.

[1126] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.2)
SANSKRIT: समभिहारविशिष्टक्रियावचनाद्धातोर्लोट्प्रत्ययो भवति सर्वेषु कालेषु, सर्वलकाराणामपवादः तस्य च लोटो हि स्व इत्येतावादेशौ भवतः, तध्वम्भाविनस्तु वा भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: When the (frequency or) repetition of an action is indicated, the affx '_Lot_' is added to the root, and the verb is repeated. And the affixes '_hi_' and '_sva_', or the affixes '_ta_' and '_dhvam_' are the substitutes of '_Lot_'.

[1127] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.3)
SANSKRIT: समुच्चीयमान क्रियावचनाद्धातोरन्यतरस्यां लोट् प्रत्ययो भवति, तस्य लोटो हिस्वावादेशौ भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Lot_' is similarly added to the root optionally, when several themes follow one after another.

[1128] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.4)
SANSKRIT: पूर्वस्मिन् लोड्विधाने यथाविध्यनुप्रयोगो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: In the first case (comprised under _sutra_ (III. 4. 2)), the same verb must be used in the subsequent clause, as the verb which was put in the Imperative mood.

[1129] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.5)
SANSKRIT: द्वितीये लोड् विधाने समुच्चये सामान्यवचनस्य धातोरनुप्रयोगः कर्तव्यः ॥
ENGLISH: In the second case (III. 4. 3) where many actions are spoken of together, the verb that is made to follow, should be such as has the sense common to all those verbs.

[1130] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.6)
SANSKRIT: छन्दसि विषये धातुसम्बन्धे सर्वेषु कालेषु लुङ् लङ् लिटः प्रत्यया भवन्ति ॥
ENGLISH: In the Vedas, the Aorist, Imperfect and Perfect are optionally employed in all tenses, in relation to verbs.

[1131] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.7)
SANSKRIT: लिङर्थे यत्र लिङ् विधीयते, विध्यादिर्हेतु हेतुमतोर्लिङित्येवमादिस्तत्र छन्दसि विषये ऽन्यतरस्यां लेट् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_Let_' is optionally employed in the Vedas, wherever the Potential can be used.

[1132] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.8)
SANSKRIT: उपसंवादे आशंकायां च गम्यमानायां छन्दसि विषये लेट् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: Where a contingent promise (a reciprocal agreement), or apprehension is implied, the affix '_Let_' is employed after a root, in the _Chhandas_ Literature.

[1133] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.9)
SANSKRIT: तुमुनोऽर्थस्तुमर्थः, तन्न छन्दसि विषये धातोः सयादयः प्रत्यया भवन्ति ॥
ENGLISH: In the Vedas the following affixes come after roots with the force of the affix '_tumun_', viz:- '_se_', '_sen_', '_ase_', '_asen_', '_kse_', '_kasen_', '_adhyai_', '_adhyain_', '_kadhyai_', '_kadhyain_', '_sadhyai_', '_sadhyain_', '_tavai_', '_taven_' and '_taven_'.

[1134] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.10)
SANSKRIT: प्रयै रोहिष्यै अव्ययिष्यै इत्येते शब्दा निपात्यन्ते छन्दसि विषये ॥
ENGLISH: The words '_prayai_', '_rohishyai_' and '_avyathishyai_' are irregular Vedic Infinitives.

[1135] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.11)
SANSKRIT: दृशे विख्ये इत्येतौ छन्दसि विषये निपात्येते ॥
ENGLISH: The words '_drise_' and '_vikhye_' are anomalous Vedic Infinitives.

[1136] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.12)
SANSKRIT: शक्नोतौ धातावुपपदे छन्दसि विषये तुमर्थे णमुल्कमुल् इत्येतौ प्रत्ययौ भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_namul_' and '_kamul_' are added to roots in the _Chhandas_ to form Infinitives, when they are governed by the verb '_sak_' (to be able).

[1137] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.13)
SANSKRIT: ईश्वरशब्द उपपदे छन्दसि विषये तुमर्थे धातोस्तोसुन्कसुन्प्रत्ययौ भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_tosun_' and '_kasun_' are added to roots in the _Chhandas_, to form Infinitives, when the word '_isvara_' is in composition.

[1138] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.14)
SANSKRIT: कृत्यानामर्थो भावकर्मणो, तस्मिन् कृत्यार्थे छन्दसि विषये तवै केन् केन्य त्वन् इत्येते प्रत्यया भवन्ति ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_tavai_', '_ken_', '_kenya_' and '_tvan_' are added to roots the _Chhandas_, in the sense of the '_Kritya_-affixes'.

[1139] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.15)
SANSKRIT: अवपूर्वाच्चक्षिङ एश्प्रत्ययो निपात्यते ॥
ENGLISH: The word '_avachakshe_' is an anomalous passive participle in the Vedas.

[1140] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.16)
SANSKRIT: भावो लक्ष्यते येन तस्मिन्नर्थे वर्तमानेभ्य स्थादिभ्यो धातुभ्यश्छन्दसि विषये तुमर्थे तोसुन् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_tosun_' comes in the Vedas after the following verbs, when mere name of the action is indicated, viz:--'_stha_' (to stand), '_in_' (to go), '_krin_' (to make), '_vad_' (to speak), '_char_' (to walk), '_hu_' (to sacrifice); '_tam_' (to grow tired) and '_jan_' (to produce).

[1141] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.17)
SANSKRIT: सृपितृदोर्द्धात्वोर्भावलक्षणेऽर्थे वर्तमानयोश्छन्दसिविषये तुमर्थे कसुन्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: In the Vedas, the affix '_kasun_' comes after the verbs '_srip_' (to creep) and '_trid_' (to injure), in the sense of Infinitives indicating name of action.

[1142] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.18)
SANSKRIT: अलं खलु इत्येतयोः प्रतिषेधवाचिनोरुपपदयोर्धातोः क्त्वा प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: According to the opinion of the Eastern Grammarians, the affix '_ktva_' comes after a verb, when there are in combination with it, the words '_alam_' and '_khalu_', expressing the sense of prohibition.

[1143] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.19)
SANSKRIT: माङो धातोर्व्यतीहारे वर्तमानादुदीचामाचार्याणां मतेन क्त्वाप्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: According to the opinion of the Northern Grammarians, the affix '_ktva_' is added to the root '_men_' (to exchange), when the sense is that of interchange, (though the action denoted by the former word is not prior to the action denoted by the latter word).

[1144] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.20)
SANSKRIT: परेण पूर्वस्य योगे गम्यमाने अवरेण च परस्य धातोः क्त्वा प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_ktya_' is added to a root, to denote what is situate on that (_para_) side or on this (_avara_) side of something.

[1145] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.21)
SANSKRIT: समानःकर्त्ता ययोर्द्धात्वर्थयोस्तत्र पूर्वकालेधात्वर्थे वर्त्तमानाद्धातोः क्त्वाप्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: When two actions have the same agent, the affix '_ktva_' comes after that verb which takes place in a time anterior to that of the other (i. e. the Absolutive in '_tva_' refers to that action which precedes in time).

[1146] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.22)
SANSKRIT: आभीक्ष्ण्यविशिष्टेऽर्थे वर्तमानाद्धातोर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_namul_' and '_ktva_' come after a root, when re-iteration is to be expressed.

[1147] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.23)
SANSKRIT: यच्छब्दउपपदे धातोः क्त्वाणमुलौ प्रत्ययौ न भवतोऽनाकांक्षे वाक्ये ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_ktva_' and '_namul_' are not added to a root, when the word '_yad_' is used, in a simple sentence, which does not depend upon another to complete the sense.

[1148] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.24)
SANSKRIT: अग्रे प्रथम पूर्व इत्येतेषूपपदेषु समानकर्तृकयोः पूर्वकाले धातोः क्त्वाणमुलौ प्रत्ययौ विभाषा भवतः ॥
ENGLISH: The affixes '_ktva_' and '_namul_' come optionally after that verb which denotes the prior action, when both verbs have the same agent, provided that the following words are in composition:- '_agre_', '_prathama_' and '_purva_'.

[1149] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.25)
SANSKRIT: कर्मण्युपपदे कृञो धातोः खमुञ् प्रत्ययो भवति आक्रोशे गम्यमाने ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_khamun_' is added to the verb '_kri_' (to make), when a word in the accusative case is in construction with it, if the sense intended implies 'abuse'.

[1150] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.26)
SANSKRIT: स्वाद्वर्थेषूपदेषु कृञो णमुल्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: (When the actions, signified by the verbs '_kri_' and another, have the same agent), the affix '_namul_' is added to the verb '_kri_' (which is concerned about a time anterior to that of the other), provided that a word signifying 'sweet' is in composition.

[1151] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.27)
SANSKRIT: अन्यथादिषूपपदेषु कृञो णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति सिद्धाप्रयोगश्चेत्करोतेर्भवति ॥
ENGLISH: When the words '_anyatha_' (otherwise), '_evam_' (so), '_katham_' (how) and '_ittham_' (thus) are compounded with the verb, then '_namul_' comes after '_kri_' (to make), if it be such that its omission would be unobjectionable.

[1152] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.28)
SANSKRIT: यथा तथा शब्दयोरुपपदयोः कृञो णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति, असूया प्रतिवचने गम्यमाने ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' is added to the root '_kri_' (to make), the words '_yatha_' and '_tatha_' being compounded with it, when an angry reply is made : (if the omission of '_krin_' is unobjectionable).

[1153] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.29)
SANSKRIT: कर्मण्युपपदे साकल्यविशिष्टेऽर्थे दृशिविदोर्द्धात्वोर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: When the object is compounded with it, the verb '_dris_' (to see), or '_vid_' (to know), takes the affix '_namul_', to denote the total number of such objects.

[1154] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.30)
SANSKRIT: यावच्छब्द उपपदे विन्दतेर्जीवतेश्च णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the verb '_vid_' (to get) and '_jiv_', (to live), when the word '_yavat_' is combined with them.

[1155] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.31)
SANSKRIT: चर्मोदरयोः कर्मणोरुपपदयोः पूरयतेर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the verb '_pur_' (to fill), when the words '_charman_' and '_udar_' are compounded with it as object.

[1156] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.32)
SANSKRIT: पूरयतेर्द्धातोर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ऊलोपश्चास्य पूरयतोरन्यतरस्यां भवति समुदायेन चेद्वर्षस्य प्रमाणमियत्ता गम्यते ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the verb '_pur_' (to fill), when the word so formed expresses a measure of rain-fall; and optionally the long '_u_' of this '_pur_' is elided.

[1157] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.33)
SANSKRIT: क्नूयो शब्दे उन्दने च, अस्माण्ण्यन्ताद्धातोश्चेलार्थेषु कर्मसु उपपदेषु णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति वर्षप्रमाणे गम्यमाने ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the causative of the root '_knuy_' (to wet), when there is compounded with it a noun denoting 'clothing', in the accusative case, as an _upapada_, if the whole word so formed expresses a measure of the rain-fall.

[1158] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.34)
SANSKRIT: निमूलसमूलशब्दयोः कर्मवाचिनोरुपपदयोः कषेर्द्धातोर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the verb '_kash_' (to rub), when the words '_nimula_' and '_samula_' are compounded with it in the accusative case.

[1159] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.35)
SANSKRIT: शुष्कादिषु कर्मवाचिषूपपदेषु पिषेर्द्धातोर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the verb '_pish_' (to grind), when the words '_sushka_' (dry), '_churna_' (powder), and '_ruksha_' (dry), in the accusative case are compounded with it.

[1160] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.36)
SANSKRIT: समूल अकृत जीव इत्येतेषु शब्देषु कर्मसूपपदेषु यथासंख्यं हन् कृञ् ग्रह् इत्येतेभ्यो धातुभ्यो णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the verbs '_han_' (to kill), '_kri_' (to make) and '_grah_' (to seize), when the words '_samula_', '_akrita_' and '_jiva_' in the accusative case are respectively compounded with them.

[1161] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.37)
SANSKRIT: करण उपपदे हन्तेर्द्धातोर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the verb '_han_', when a word in the Instrumental case is in composition with it.

[1162] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.38)
SANSKRIT: स्नेहवाचिनि करण उपपदे पिषेर्द्धातोर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the verb '_pish_' (to grind), when a word in the Instrumental case denoting 'liquid' is in composition.

[1163] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.39)
SANSKRIT: हस्तवाचिनि करणे उपपदे वर्ततेर्गृह्णातेश्च णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the verbs '_varti_' (causative of _vrit_) and '_grah_', when a word denoting 'hand', in the Instrumental case, is in composition.

[1164] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.40)
SANSKRIT: स्ववाचिनि करणे उपपदे पुषेर्धातोर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the verb '_push_' (to feed), when a word in the Instrumental case, having the sense of '_sva_' is in composition.

[1165] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.41)
SANSKRIT: अधिकरणवाचिन्युपपदे बध्नातेर्द्धातोर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the verb '_bandh_'(to bind), when a word expressing location is in construction with it.

[1166] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.42)
SANSKRIT: संज्ञायाम् विषये बध्नातेर्द्धातोर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the verb '_bandh_' (to bind) when the word so formed denotes an appellative.

[1167] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.43)
SANSKRIT: जीवपुरुषयोः कर्तृवाचिनोरुपपदयोःयथासंख्यम् नशिवहोर्द्धात्वोर्णमुल्प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the roots '_nas_' (to perish) and '_vah_' (to carry), when the words '_jiva_' (life) and '_purusha_' (person) expressing the agent of these verbs, are respectively in construction with them.

[1168] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.44)
SANSKRIT: ऊर्ध्वशब्दे कर्तृवाचिन्युपपदे शुषिपूरोर्द्धात्वोर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the roots '_sush_' (to dry), and '_pur_' (to fill), when the word '_urdhva_', denoting an agent, is in composition with them.

[1169] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.45)
SANSKRIT: उपमाने कर्मण्युपपदे चकारात् कर्तरि धातोर्णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after a root, when an object or an agent, denoting similitude, is in composition with it.

[1170] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.46)
SANSKRIT: निमूलसमूलयोरित्येतदारभ्य कषादयः, एतेषु यथाविध्वनुप्रयोगो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The same verb should be employed after the gerunds formed from the verbs '_kash_' &c; as the verb from which the gerund is derived.

[1171] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.47)
SANSKRIT: दंश दशने, अस्माद्धातोरुपपूर्वात्तृतीयान्त उपपदे णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
ENGLISH: The affix '_namul_' comes after the root '_dans_' (to bite) preceded by the preposition '_upa_'; when a word ending with the third case-affix is in composition with it.

[1172] panini_sutras.jsonl (3.4.48)
SANSKRIT: हिंसा प्राण्युपघातः, तदर्थानां धातूनामनुप्रयोगधातुनां समानकर्मकाणां तृतीयान्त उपपदे णमुल् प्रत्ययो भवति ॥
